process_details: Co-milled using oscillatory ball mill (Mixer Mill MM301, Retsch GmbH & Co., Germany). Sample powder (1 g) placed in 25 ml stainless steel milling jar with two 12 mm diameter stainless steel balls; milled at 30 Hz at 4 ± 2 °C for 60 min. Powder temperature after milling ≈25 °C. Stored in airtight container over silica gel at 4 °C until further analysis.
detection_methods: XRPD; DSC (single Tg confirmed amorphous mixture).
notes: 1:2 NAP:CIM crystallized to cimetidine despite highest Tg (40.2 ± 1.1 °C). XRPD peak at 23.5° (cimetidine) detected at all three storage temperatures (4/25/40 °C) by day 33. process_details: Physical mixtures prepared by gentle mortar mixing for 5 min, dried 10 min at 373 K (to remove water from IDP hemihydrate), then melted in aluminum dish on hot plate at T = 440 K for <=2 min. Vitrification by fast transfer of dish from hot plate to a cold copper plate. Samples analyzed immediately after preparation.
detection_methods: XRD (Rigaku-Denki D/MAX RAPID II-R, Ag K_alpha); DSC (Mettler-Toledo DSC 1, 5 and 10 K/min); TMDSC (TOPEM, 0.5 K/min); BDS (Novo-Control Alpha); ATR-FTIR.
notes: Storage T = 297 K (= 23.85 C), RH = 25% (quasi-constant). DSC at 5 K/min showed no recrystallization for any mixture. Tg from DSC 10 K/min (Table 1, second column). Original paper also reports TMDSC 0.5 K/min values which differ by 1-3 K. Pure EZB recrystallized within 21 days (Dc=15%) under same conditions, providing strong reference for stabilization effect. Authors found no specific molecular EZB-IDP interactions (FTIR); stabilization attributed to antiplasticizing effect of higher-Tg IDP. | [review] Protokolla 297 K (24 C) / 25% RH ei sovi mihinkaan standardiluokkaan: ei ICH Q1A long-term (60% RH), ei dry_short_term (RH ei 0% eika <30 vrk), ei accelerated

notes: Tg from DSC 10 K/min (Table 1, second column). Original paper also reports TMDSC 0.5 K/min values which differ by 1-3 K. process_details: Heated to 5 °C above the melting point at 10 °C/min, held for 5 min, then quenched at uncontrolled rate to -50 °C and held for 15 min. Second heating extended to storage temperature.
detection_methods: DSC, MDSC, FT-IR imaging, polarized light microscopy
notes: Storage above Tg (T_s = Tg + 0.3*(Tm50:50 - Tg)). Crystallization detected by DSC after 5 weeks (melting endotherm at 132 °C). Phase separation detected by FT-IRi after 1 day. | [review] DSC H/C/H cycle for GFA classification was NOT performed. Second heating ended at storage temperature, not above Tm. Therefore crystallizes_on_dsc_cooling and crystallizes_on_dsc_reheating set to null (measurement not performed for Class 1/2/3 assessment), and gfa_class_dsc should remain null. Pajula 2014 used DSC only for sample preparation, not for Baird et al. 2010 GFA classification.; Tg updated from Kilpelainen et al. 2020 (DOI: 10.1016/j.ejpb.2020.08.007), Table 2, DSC 10 K/min, n=3, replacing Pajula 2014 TMDSC value. Three pairs in Pajula 2014 (terfenadine-paracetamol, terfenadine-indomethacin, indomethacin-paracetamol) were re-measured by Kilpelainen 2020 with standard DSC 10 K/min, enabling cross-corpus consistency.

FT-IRi did not detect phase separation, possibly due to dispersed system with local 50:50 ratios. | [review] Pair-Tg from Table 3 (TMDSC TOPEM, 2 K/min underlying), not standard DSC 10 K/min. Pure component Tg values in Table 2 are at 10 K/min but not used for pair-Tg field per schema. Pajula 2014 is the only paper in corpus with TMDSC-only pair-Tg measurement.; DSC H/C/H cycle for GFA classification was NOT performed. Second heating ended at storage temperature, not above Tm. Therefore crystallizes_on_dsc_cooling and crystallizes_on_dsc_reheating set to null (measurement not performed for Class 1/2/3 assessment), and gfa_class_dsc should remain null. Pajula 2014 used DSC only for sample preparation, not for Baird et al. 2010 GFA classification.
